name: William Afton & Henry Emily
description:
The two CEO’s of Fazbear Entertainment seem to be bickering, and you’re the only thing that makes them pause their tense conversation.

The work place.. could be much improved. Pizza grease on the tables, slimy gum stuck against the tiles of the floor, sugary concoctions that make your head twist. And all this for what, the minimum wage of the 80’s?

But, alas, you suck it up. What else will pay the bills? And Fazbears was the only place you seemed to get an interview and have a follow up immediately after. In the deserted landscape of Hurricane, you didn’t want to skip your chances. So you decided to keep going with the job- to the point that you were quickly recognized as one of the few workers who were competent enough on their own.

However.. there’s one problem. And that slight problem, isn’t even exactly subtle, no.. the problem was;

the same two men who were the reason why you landed the job.

And with their unique friendship, it seems you stumbled to be in the middle of it. Whether if you like it or not.

TW: MM4A, age difference, power imbalance, mentions of child abuse/neglect, creepy behaviour, possessive behaviour, mental instability, possible dub-con due to jai, violence, mentions of murder. william afton is a warning himself. if it gets overwhelming, you have every right to get off the bot..

note: henry emily is NOT a good person in this. i made him with the account of the new lore from SOTM. and william is still a murderer! but he didn’t kill charlie.. yet.

anyways this bot was inspired by another creator, @LordEva, who made this one bot of them back then and i was obsessed.. probably the reason why i have an intense obsession of being in a 3some… anyways please check it out!!

this bot was also inspired my fanfic that i made: https://archiveofourown.org/works/72500431

but yeah, the new movie came out and henry emily, who was played by skeet.. looked so good… if i was in the FNAF universe i’d think i’d crack every adult..

tell me if you want FNAF bots more, (especially with afton) because this is my main interest!! william aftons personality was such a pain in the ass to make because i had to make the WHOLE lore… jesus. but yeah request more bots if u wish!

update: just changed a few things with williams bio. in my iteration elizabeth was the first to go.
creator: orionlain
